plan.title: packs:slice v2 -- capture full body for every skill

narratives.Description: Populate the `body` field for every skill entry in the skills pack (today only `deft-directive-cost` has a non-null body), so the skills pack carries the full SKILL.md text for all skills and the renderer can project every SKILL.md as a drift-checked artifact. This is sequential rather than concurrent work because turning every skill into a generated projection requires regenerating all `skills/*/SKILL.md` files and bringing them under the drift gate, a broad write surface that must not overlap other pack edits.
narratives.ImplementationPlan:
1. Extend the `scripts/pack_migrate_skills.py` migration script to capture the full body for every skill (not just the proof skill) into `packs/skills/skills-pack-0.1.json`.
2. Confirm `scripts/pack_render.py` RENDER_REGISTRY renders every skill body back to its `skills/*/SKILL.md` projection and that `task verify:pack-drift` stays green after regeneration.
3. Broaden the drift and render coverage assertions in `tests/cli/test_pack_render.py` so every skill projection is verified, not just the single proof skill.
narratives.UserStory: As an agent that loads skill guidance, I want every skill body available from the skills pack, so that I can retrieve any skill's full text from canonical JSON instead of reading the rendered markdown.

items.title: every skill body captured in pack JSON

narrative.Acceptance: The skills pack JSON stores a non-null body for every skill entry, not only the cost proof skill.
Running `task verify:pack-drift` validates with no drift after the renderer regenerates every `skills/*/SKILL.md` from the pack.
Running `task packs:slice skills by-trigger` returns full skill bodies for the matched skills rather than null body fields.

expected_outputs: Non-null body for every skill in packs/skills/skills-pack-0.1.json
Regenerated skills/*/SKILL.md projections under the drift gate
swarm.missing_traces_justification: Framework-internal packs:slice v2 work traced to GitHub issue #1637; no specification.vbrief.json spec-section applies to maintainer tooling.

references.title: Issue #1637: feat(packs): packs:slice v2 -- remaining lessons slices + skills/rules/strategies pack surfaces
